subcodes.first_line: Say: O God of existence and Sovereign of the unseen and the seen! I beseech Thee by the Sun of the heaven of Thy knowledge and the Ark of the ocean of Thy wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا اله الوجود و مالک الغیب و الشهود اسئلک بشمس سماء علمک و سفینه بحر حکمتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Word of God the cause of creation
